seoTitle: Degilbo vs Delan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Degilbo and Delan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Degilbo and Delan.
heading: Degilbo vs Delan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Degilbo, Queensland and Delan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Delan has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Degilbo (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Degilbo or Delan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Degilbo has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Delan scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Degilbo scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Delan scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Degilbo or Delan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Delan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
